prompt: Replace with original designer prompt or issue-derived prompt.
interpreted_intent: Replace with concise interpretation of the expected screen outcome.
primary_decision_or_job: Replace with the main decision, action or understanding the screen supports.
domain_object: Replace with the main domain object.
business_context: Replace with relevant domain context or leave empty if not needed.
evidence_needs: Replace with required facts, proof or source-system signals.
trust_and_validation_needs: Replace with uncertainty, proof-gap or validation needs.
constraints: Replace with explicit prompt constraints or detected guardrails.
